creator: lehmann@ans-netz.de
text:
The output should normally look like:

(cd .libs && rm -f libCEGUILuaScriptModule.la && ln -s ../libCEGUILuaScriptModule.la libCEGUILuaScriptModule.la)
Making all in include
Making all in package
Making all in Samples
Making all in XMLRefSchema
Making all in makefiles

because the Samples are not built! It looks like post-patch: from Makefile
didn't work well to remove Samples from the Makefile.
Can you please send me your workdir directly by mail?
